title: GEN AI LIVE: Make Data and AI Make Sense | Walter Shields (EP 05)
description: A practical walkthrough of connecting operational data with defensible AI decisions, then translating outcomes into reliable shipping steps.
proofLine: The session turns messy telemetry into a reusable, evidence-first decision rhythm.
audienceLine: Teams shipping AI-enabled services.

title: Gen AI Live Ep 04 - How Product Teams Actually Ship AI
description: A candid field report on sequencing, validation, and delivery rituals that move Gen AI work from prototype to stable capability.
proofLine: Production stories are translated into concrete checkpoints teams can adopt immediately.
audienceLine: Product teams and delivery leads.

title: Gen-AI Live with David Whyte
description: A guest-led live session translating architecture choices into practical outcomes with explicit quality and risk tradeoffs.
proofLine: Expert framing keeps live experimentation tied to proof criteria instead of marketing claims.
audienceLine: Product builders and AI strategists.

title: Gen-AI Live with Rodrigo Reyes
description: A live exchange focused on measurable implementation decisions, with practical tradeoff mapping for real workflows.
proofLine: Decision points are surfaced as explicit gates, reducing ambiguity between ideas and execution.
audienceLine: Teams adopting AI in operational routines.

title: Gen AI Live w/ Alfredo - Sun 12PM ET
description: A practical segment with scenario-driven guidance for applying Gen AI patterns in day-to-day teams.
proofLine: The format makes recurring AI operations clearer by pinning each suggestion to visible constraints.
audienceLine: Teams introducing AI in weekly execution loops.

title: Gen AI Live w/ Arslan - Thu 11am ET
description: A focused workshop segment on execution patterns for AI work with an emphasis on measurable proof and team handoffs.
proofLine: Hand-off quality improves when each live decision is reduced to a tested contract.
audienceLine: Delivery and coordination teams.

title: Live Workshop: OPENAI ATLAS × GAMMA × AGENT TOOL
description: A live workflow workshop combining Atlas, Gamma, and agent tooling for reproducible workflow acceleration.
proofLine: The stack is exercised end-to-end to surface integration points and control boundaries.

title: Live Workshop: Open AI Atlas Browser + Agent Tool

proofLine: Browser-led loops are constrained with checkpoints to preserve clarity and repeatability.
audienceLine: Operators integrating web-first AI agents.

title: Live Workshop: OpenAI AgentKit for Beginners
description: A guided beginner-to-operator track on building and validating lightweight, useful AI agents.

title: ChatGPT Agent Workshop
description: A practical build workshop for turning prompts into dependable agent behavior with stable handoff and review gates.
